3030920.name: Astral Pursuit
3030920.description:
Endlessly Protect an Ending Universe

Swarms of soul-harvesting enemies await you in this chaotic, objective-based action rogue-lite! Voyage to unknown lands, each with randomized weather, hazards, and treasures. Each run uncovers lore and secrets about the universe and its Voyagers.

No Voyage is the Same

Master one of the chosen elemental Voyagers, then master them some more. Remix fighting styles and abilities by fine-tuning their effect with loadouts and Fluxes. Level up and personalize your abilities with augments and synergize their properties to become immortal or clear hordes in seconds (or both!).

Make or Break the Laws of Physics

Collect relics and stack their effects infinitely. Some relics provide passive effects; others help you demolish everything on screen. Completing stages amplifies your growth potential, ramping up the challenge, drop rates, and even affecting how lucky you are!

Randomized Selective Chaos

Bright VFX and elemental explosions cover every dynamically lit stage. Each world comes with its own challenges, enemies, and even sentient Storms that seek to put an end to your Voyage. Choose to fight the final boss when the time is right, or loop endlessly, risking it all for incredible power. 

Features

  • 8+ Planets: All with night/day and aesthetic variants randomized at every stage.

  • Infinitely Scaling Challenges: Battle for as long as you (or your PC) can keep up.

  • A Universal Bullet Hell: Balance pure luck with carefully placed ability usage to incinerate hordes of enemies.

  • Random Objectives: From Soul Fusion to Annihilation -- Every stage offers a random selection of objectives that scale endlessly.

  • Hundreds of Ability Setups*: Combine abilities and augments to Voyage in style -- your style.  (*When all characters are available)

  • Missions and Lore Entries: Continue building your experience before and after Voyages.

Discord

Join our Discord to contribute to the game with your feedback and ideas, or chat with the community.
